title: Triada
description: A mod that adds a new ore - Tribium.
body:
After installing the mod, new ores will appear in the world - Tribium. Tribium has different variations: Blue Tribium, Yellow Tribium, Red Tribium, Pink Tribium and Green Tribium. Each Tribium has its own qualities, as well as the method of obtaining. Regular, blue, yellow and red can be found as ore, and green and pink when trading with new mobs


# You can find new ores


# Tribium ore
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d0554ba30f5dae27b6c61041f5eee792b8db9e5_0.webp)
Tribium ore generated from 0 to 32 Y coordinates.

# Blue Tribium ore
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fce214ca153ffcff92faca944e173fc59f907bdc.png)
Blue Tribium ore generated from -64 to 4 Y coordinates.

# Yellow Tribium ore
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fh3bxTO2/images/bb5a44ced4e403cd3934f783b5d79f0ee9035eeb.png)
Yellow Tribium ore generated from 16 to 96 Y coordinates.

# Red Tribium ore
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb168c736a22f920529d9ab0736a715d6b7d7e58.png)
Red Tribium ore generated from 0 to 128 Y coordinates.

# All Tribiums
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26c3a4a78324042a72102b9c288412c3ee629cf7.png)
Some Tribiums can be found in the mine as ore, and others when trading with new merchant mobs.

# Stabilizer
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bc5eaa6a6533e86e1ac51f9a74d95b927b6e526.png)
Stabilizer - item controlling the operation of an unstable Tribium

# Tribium ingots
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e66a87411559bec6a395d18710456b420c1727c0.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1745b79c5bb354a92b16acf9708bbc59e12bb6f9_0.webp)
Ingots can be made from iron and tribium on smithing table

# Tribium metal armors
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92384e9ab22839fe4dd8d6de69e0d01fd6c9972c.png)
Each with a full set gives an effect: Red fire resistance; Yellow speed; Blue night vision

# Blue, Yellow, Red Tribium metal instruments
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80c7350f52a83813aaf084193dc2f789e29b6624.png)
Each sword has an effect: Blue: Warden Effect; Yellow: Slow Down; Red: Sets it on fire

# Triada alloy
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21ce5bdbb7e6c3fabc2d7fb473a6ba41793d7e80_0.webp)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f615059ea8d68ae73b9bfb295726a23723df2d2_0.webp)

# Reforced Stabilizer
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47d4ef532ca240b55fed39a76da03d2cf5d1a733_0.webp)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3599fc28c0b8e4fa49f057c8b24ba30449b2852b_0.webp)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b10eaabd6e16c0f13b6c01deb6aad742f956e4c.png)
A more powerful stabilizer. It is not spent in crafting on the crafting table.

# Unstable Giant
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5b58e42aeb80ae920691b21ce213b53841893d4_0.webp)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53e199c77164a8ed42afe8f1a6a618c65d38f08a.png)
-Gives Slowness 2 for 3 seconds for owner
-Gives Darckness for 10 seconds for owner
-Gives Wither 2 for 3 seconds for enemy
-Gives Blindness for 3 seconds for enemy
-Gives Slowness 2 for 3 seconds for enemy

# Triada alloy armor
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d8142772160b6dde2550fe7e9c9ca8b7214b7f0.png)
Full set give luck and regeneration

# Dmitry Morozov. 
You can find it everywhere in Overworld. You can buy a business suit from him.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be28039cc5abcd88a8bdf13553b5531e8ad4c63b_0.webp)


# Buisness suit. 
With a full set, it gives the effect of a village hero
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f253aaa1de868874aadae70815d8e21951f4b35_0.webp)


# Zefol. God of War. 
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84ac9a74446a12b55e27c37e35fa3dce536a4e62_0.webp)


# Divine altar. 
If you build it and put a block of the Zephala or Purple altar in the center and press the RCM on it, God will be called. ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bbb78395a932a420191d4eece7afd5d7256a04e_0.webp)
# Zefol`s sword. 
causes weakness of 30 for 5 seconds and slowness of 30 for 5 seconds![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6e61e8c652f7a20bd18dcb7df697af55d8771c4_0.webp)


# Purpud`s Pendant. 
Removes all negative effects
